main.description: Store plaintext through the operator-trusted SecureVault envelope path. This endpoint requires operator authorization. The response separates the stable ciphertext CID from the rotatable envelope manifest CID.

data_b64.description: Base64-encoded plaintext bytes. The server stores only ciphertext and an envelope manifest.

recipient.description: Visible-ASCII recipient DID or key id for the initial wrapped DEK. Defaults to the node operator DID.

aad_b64.description: Optional base64-encoded associated data bound into both the ciphertext and the wrapped DEK. The decoded AAD payload is capped at 65536 bytes.

ct_cid.description: CID of the encrypted ciphertext block. This remains stable across manifest/key-wrap rotation.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the envelope manifest carrying algorithm metadata, AAD, and wrapped DEKs.

recipient.description: Recipient DID or key id used for the initial DEK wrap.
